title: Am-Tech 5Pc Rotary Burr Set
features: DURABLE: These rotary burrs are made from strong, hardened carbon steel for durability
IDEAL FOR WOODWORKERS: They are ideal for grinding, polishing, shaping and burnishing wood surfaces
VERSATILE: With a 6mm (1/4") shank, the set includes five popular shapes: ball, oval, cylinder, large and small cone
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 5x Burr See more
